narrative:
Whetstone Township has 1,391 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points.
